project_type: Node.js event-management platform (Horrorgeticon Ops) with custom server framework, vanilla JS PWA frontend
build_system: None (zero npm dependencies). Direct Node.js execution.
test_framework: Custom smoke test: server/test/smoke.mjs - spawns a real server with --demo, hits all API endpoints sequentially
verification_instructions: 1. Run 'node server/test/smoke.mjs' - all tests must pass. 2. Start server with 'node server/main.js --demo' and test endpoints manually.
setup_instructions: No setup needed. Node.js >= 18 is the only requirement. Zero npm dependencies.
environment_constraints: No npm install needed. No Docker. Tests run against a real server instance spawned by the test file.
contribution_requirements: All server modules follow the pattern in server/modules/*.mod.js. Routes are registered via { get, post } destructured from the route registrar. Role-based access via { roles: ['management'] } option. HTML/CSV exports use sendText() from kernel/http.js.
key_patterns: Module pattern: export default { name, title, version, description, routes({ get, post, ... }, { db, bus, feed }) { ... } }. Feed entries stored in 'feed' collection with { id, t, time, text, kind, level, scope, by, module, mazeId }. CSV exports use sendText(ctx.res, 200, content, contentType, headers) and return Symbol.for('handled'). Role checking: { roles: ['management'] } passed as second arg to route registration. Tests: section('Title') + ok(condition, label) pattern in smoke.mjs.
directory_structure: server/modules/*.mod.js (feature modules), server/kernel/ (core: db, bus, auth, http, util), server/test/smoke.mjs (tests), server/seed/seed.js (demo data), web/ (frontend PWA), web/js/views/ (view components), web/js/core/ (shared utilities)
